latin: Vigil armatus, sclopetum in latronem dirigens, lente dixit: 'te ipsum rogare debes: felixne me sentio? agedum — sentisne te felicem, latruncule?'

questions.prompt: What is the officer doing while speaking?
questions.target: Pointing a gun at a criminal
choices: Pointing a gun at a criminal

translation: An armed officer, aiming his gun at a thief, slowly said: 'You've got to ask yourself: do I feel lucky? Go ahead — do you feel lucky, punk?'
